# Stop payment fraud and boost revenue

Don’t let payment fraud hinder business growth. Get the only solution that helps you stop fraudulent transactions and manage risk in one place.

see sift in action

![banner\_platform](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/banner_platform.webp)

###### Overview

*   Overview
*   How It Works

## Simplify fraud management

### Protect every transaction

### Automate payment review

### Unlock business growth

Instantly detect and block risky transactions, shut off fraudulent currency movement, and proactively prevent alternative payment abuse to protect your business down to every transaction.

![explore-1](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Automate decisions, reduce manual review, and investigate complex trends in real time. Extend your payment fraud defenses and simplify chargeback resolution with dispute data ingestion and strong user identification.

![workflow](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Track business health, unblock trusted customers, and secure customer loyalty with confidence. Our PSD2 Compatibility solution makes it easy to expand into new markets without worrying about regulatory roadblocks.

![order](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## The Digital Trust & Safety Platform

Your single solution to complete, flexible, and easy fraud prevention.

![payment protection](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201100%201100'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![background\_blue\_with\_yellow\_boreder](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201080%201115'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## One solution customized for your needs

![fight](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20361%20361'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Fight fraud with confidence

Outpace competitors and lead your industry. Sift's patented technology and fraud strategies enable businesses to improve chargeback rates by 70% compared to industry averages.

![win](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20361%20361'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Win on your terms

Sift meets you at your point of need and adapts as your business evolves so you can stay flexible. Say goodbye to rigid review practices, disparate point solutions, and unclear decisioning.

![Innovate](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20361%20361'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Innovate with a trusted partner

Stay ahead of the changing payment ecosystem with our trust and safety experts, payments specialists, and product innovation to meet the evolving needs of your business and customers.

Launch unbeatable defenses against current and future threats using accurate, real-time data from our global network of one trillion events per year, representing 34K sites and apps.
